question: Should M1 temporal validity / supersession-aware retrieval become the default strategy?

decision.reason: temporal-local fixes the stale temporal failures but still leaves the multi-hop support-chain blocker unresolved; a default switch requires block=0 or an explicit waiver.

next_step: Keep M1 opt-in and validate the M1+M3 runtime path against real Engram data; do not flip default until multi-hop/source support reaches block=0.
